raw_responses.title: Large Language Models for Anomaly and Out-of-Distribution Detection
raw_responses.snippet: Survey of LLM anomaly detection; covers post-hoc visual explanations including attention heatmaps and token-level importance scores.

raw_responses.title: AD-LLM: Benchmarking Large Language Models for Anomaly Detection
raw_responses.snippet: Benchmark for LLM anomaly detection across NLP tasks.

raw_responses.title: LLM-LADE: log anomaly detection with explanation
raw_responses.snippet: Three-stage architecture: data augmentation, PEFT, online optimization. Generates explanations alongside detections.

raw_responses.title: Exploring LLM-based Frameworks for Fault Diagnosis
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-based fault diagnosis frameworks across multiple domains.

raw_responses.title: Hybrid LLM-Assisted Fault Diagnosis for 5G/6G Networks
raw_responses.snippet: Hy-LIFT framework: rule-based engine + semi-supervised classifier + LLM augmentation. Generates operator-ready explanations.

raw_responses.title: Boosting Anomaly Detection With LLMs
raw_responses.snippet: Survey of LLM-augmented anomaly detection. Activation-based interpretability is part of the literature.

raw_responses.title: LLMAD: Time Series Anomaly Detection with LLMs (KDD 2025)
raw_responses.snippet: In-context anomaly detection via similar-segment retrieval; chain-of-thought-style reasoning.

raw_responses.title: Thermal fault diagnosis of complex electrical equipment based on infrared image recognition
raw_responses.snippet: Source-domain reference. Infrared image-based fault recognition with deep learning.
